justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "tomorrow" as June 1st and accurately presented available slots for that day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively presented multiple available options for the requested day, allowing the user to choose their preferred time without further prompting.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and successfully booked the appointment in the second turn without any unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and confirming the booking efficiently.
